steps.title: Keep the full name intact
steps.content: The blank comes inside the proper name Bodys Isek Kingelez, immediately before the main verb. No punctuation should split the parts of the name or separate the subject from the verb.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
• Choice A: Inserts a semicolon inside a name.
  • Choice B: Inserts an unnecessary comma before the verb.
  • Choice C: Leaves the name unbroken and connects it cleanly to the verb.
  • Choice D: Inserts a colon where nothing is being introduced.
The answer is C.
